name: com.gameframex.unity.asset
description:
GameFrameX Asset — Unity asset management package built on YooAsset. Provides synchronous and asynchronous loading of assets, sub-assets, raw files, scenes, and asset bundles. Supports multi-package management with configurable play modes, hot-update URLs, resource path separation, and automatic cleanup of unused assets and bundle files. Docs: https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com

GameFrameX Asset — 基于 YooAsset 的 Unity 资源管理功能包。提供资源、子资源、原始文件、场景和资源包的同步与异步加载。支持多包管理，可配置运行模式、热更新地址、资源路径分离，以及未使用资源与资源包的自动清理。文档：https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com
